# JUSSSY

<div id="checkingScreen" style="position:fixed; inset:0; background:#000; z-index:999999; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:white; flex-direction:column; gap:15px;">
  <h3>Sedang memeriksa akses...</h3>
  <div style="width:50px; height:50px; border:4px solid #333; border-top:4px solid #ff4f9a; border-radius:50%; animation: spin 1s linear infinite;"></div>
</div>

<div id="lockScreen" style="display:none;">
  <div class="box">
    <h3>Masukkan Password</h3>
    <input id="pass" type="password" placeholder="Password">
    <button onclick="tryUnlock()">Masuk</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="contents">
  <!-- Konten asli akan muncul di sini setelah unlock -->
</div>

<script>
// <![CDATA[
window.mewmew = ``;

function getRealContent(){
  try {
    let decoded = atob(window.mewmew);
    decoded = decoded.replace(/&lt;/g,'<').replace(/&gt;/g,'>').replace(/&quot;/g,'"');
    return decoded;
  } catch(e) {
    return "<p>Konten rusak.</p>";
  }
}

function tryUnlock(){
  const pass = document.getElementById("pass").value.trim();
  if (pass === "2026") {   // Ganti password sesuai keinginan
    document.getElementById("lockScreen").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("contents").innerHTML = getRealContent();
  } else {
    alert("Password salah!");
  }
}

// Auto check
if (typeof window.checkPreviousAccess === "function" && window.checkPreviousAccess()) {
  document.getElementById("contents").innerHTML = getRealContent();
} else {
  document.getElementById("lockScreen").style.display = "flex";
}
// ]]>
</script>
